split_by.description: Describes how the payment will be split. If split_by is Percentage, then the split amounts must add up to exactly 100. If split_by is Amount, then the amount represents cents and the last split amount must be `null` to capture the remainder.

hidden_account_number.description: An obfuscated version of the account number which can be used for display purposes.

encrypted_account_number.description: Ciphertext containing the full bank account number, which must be decrypted using a key provided by Gusto. Only visible with the `contractor_payment_methods:read:account_number` scope.

priority.description: The order of priority for each payment split, with priority 1 being the first bank account paid. Priority must be unique and sequential.

split_amount.description: If `split_by` is 'Amount', this is in cents (e.g., 500 for $5.00) and exactly one account must have a `split_amount` of `null` to capture the remainder. If `split_by` is 'Percentage', this is the percentage value (e.g., 60 for 60%).

schema.description:
Not Found 
  
The requested resource does not exist. Make sure the provided ID/UUID is valid.

error_key.description: Specifies where the error occurs. Typically this key identifies the attribute/parameter related to the error.

category.description: Specifies the type of error. The category provides error groupings and can be used to build custom error handling in your integration.

message.description: Provides details about the error - generally this message can be surfaced to an end user.

errors.message: The requested resource was not found.

schema.title: Not-Found-Error-Object
